target.technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with complete task execution. Both forward and reverse transfer phases completed successfully with appropriate hand usage and no penalties.
strengths: Clean midair transfers throughout both phases
Proper hand switching between forward and reverse directions
No dropped objects or placement errors
Consistent technique maintained across all 12 transfers
improvement_suggestions: Focus on reducing overall completion time - current 223s is in novice range despite good technique
Work on more efficient movement patterns to approach expert benchmark of 40-60s
Consider reducing time between object pickups to improve flow

target.technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth, controlled cutting technique. Time of 73 seconds places this in expert range (60-90s). Minimal apparent deviations from pattern line.
strengths: Efficient completion time well within expert range
Consistent bimanual technique with appropriate stabilization
Smooth, controlled cutting motion throughout
Complete pattern cut without gauze detachment
improvement_suggestions: Maintain even closer adherence to pattern line to minimize deviation penalties
Consider slightly slower cutting speed to improve precision if needed

penalties.description: Estimated minor deviations from marked line at multiple points during cutting

target.technique_summary: Expert-level demonstration of extracorporeal knot formation with excellent bilateral hand coordination and proper knot pusher technique. Clean, efficient movement pattern typical of experienced surgeon.
strengths: Smooth bilateral hand coordination during throw formation
Proper knot pusher positioning and advancement technique
Consistent throw formation and spacing
Efficient time management
improvement_suggestions: Video shows isolated knot technique but lacks context of full FLS Task 4 requirements
Would benefit from demonstration of suture placement and tissue interaction phases

target.technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient completion time of 45 seconds. Minor deviation from target mark was the only penalty observed.
strengths: Very fast completion time (45s vs 20-40s expert benchmark)
Smooth instrument coordination throughout all phases
Proper loop tension and secure final result
Clean suture cutting technique
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise loop placement directly at the marked line
Take additional time during placement phase to ensure exact positioning

penalties.description: Loop appears to be positioned approximately 1-2mm above the black mark line

target.technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion time and high precision cutting. Minimal deviations from marked line.
strengths: Very fast completion time (38s vs 60-90s expert benchmark)
Smooth, continuous cutting motion
Excellent gauze handling - remained attached throughout
Complete circular cut achieved
improvement_suggestions: Minor attention to precision at 3 o'clock position to eliminate 1mm deviation

penalties.description: Minor deviation visible at 3 o'clock position, estimated 1mm outside marked line
Slight deviation at 9 o'clock position, estimated 0.5mm outside marked line

target.technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with smooth bilateral transfers and proper reverse direction execution. Completion time of 95 seconds falls within intermediate range (60-120s).
strengths: Clean object transfers without drops
Proper execution of reverse direction sequence
Consistent instrument control throughout
Efficient movement patterns
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall time to approach expert range (40-60s)
Work on faster initial pickup phase to improve efficiency
